'''Grosteek''' was a [[Vaathkree (species)|Vaathkree]] and part-owner of the [[Farrimmer Cafe]]. Along with his partner, [[H'nib Statermast]], who had taken in the poor [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] when he was on his last few [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], Grosteek helped [[Bnugor]] recover his pet [[snuzzleguff]], [[Snowball (object)|Snowball]].
